x18tc:threadedComment.x18tc:text: To whoever took the time to make this, You're a Gem! Re-opened
Thank you kind sir! Marked as resolved
Select "File" in the top left corner of your screen, then select "Make a copy". Select OK and then you have your own copy that you can check off and edit all you like. Marked as resolved
Hello, really liking this spreadsheet but I'm just wondering why do some titles have -6 or -4 for example?

Sorry for the late response, I don't really check these anymore. The negative numbers are the underground areas. The negative numbers go down based on the difficulty of the area. The positive numbers are the overworld going up by difficulty.
What do these negative numbers mean? For siofra river, ainsel river, nokron, etc.
maybe cause they're underground? that's my only guess other then an error 1 total reaction Malaclypse Younger reacted with 👍 at 2024-09-09 09:38 AM
will you make one of these for the new dlc when it comes out?
